title: Full e-commerce storefront with order placement and admin panel for Creative Prints and Design

requirements.text: Implement a customer-facing store page that displays all 3D printed products with product images, names, descriptions, and prices fetched from the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Store page renders a responsive product grid
Each product card shows image, name, description, and formatted price
Products are fetched from the backend via React Query

requirements.text: Allow customers to place orders through the site by adding products to a cart and completing a checkout flow that captures customer details and submits a store order to the backend.

quotes: I want them to be able to place orders and browse products

acceptanceCriteria: Customers can add products to a cart from the store page
A checkout page collects customer name, email, shipping address, and order details
Submitting the checkout form creates a StoreOrder record in the backend
A success confirmation is shown after order submission

requirements.text: Restrict admin panel access exclusively to the Internet Identity principal associated with lanepeevy@gmail.com. The backend must verify admin identity on all admin operations and the frontend must only render the admin panel when the authenticated user is recognized as admin.

quotes: Admin access is currently determined by email. And I want it to have my Admin access registered with lanepeevy@gmail.com
I just want to be able to add my 3d printed products look at orders, you know admin stuff

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes an isAdmin query that returns true only for the designated admin principal
Admin dashboard page checks isAdmin on load and redirects non-admins away
The admin navigation link in the header is only visible to the authenticated admin
All admin mutations (add/edit/delete product, update order status) reject calls from non-admin principals

requirements.text: Build an admin dashboard with tabs for Products management and Orders management. The Products tab must allow the admin to add, edit, and delete 3D printed products (with image upload, name, description, price). The Orders tab must display all customer orders with status, customer details, and the ability to update order status.

quotes: I just want to be able to add my 3d printed products look at orders, you know admin stuff

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has at minimum a Products tab and an Orders tab
Products tab lists all products and provides add/edit/delete dialogs with image upload
Orders tab lists all store orders with customer name, items ordered, total, and current status
Admin can update the status of an order (e.g., Pending → Processing → Shipped → Completed)
All changes persist in the backend canister state

constraints: Admin access must be gated by Internet Identity principal, not a manually entered email field
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Customer account creation or login beyond Internet Identity
Multi-admin support — only lanepeevy@gmail.com is admin
